personal.name: Török Dániel
personal.title: Backend Developer
personal.bio: As a backend developer, I design and build systems that are stable, scalable, and maintainable in the long term. I primarily work with Java-based technologies and have a strong interest in microservices architecture and well-structured, clean code. I continuously invest in improving my skills, explore new technologies, and aim to raise the professional standard of every project I contribute to.

jobs.title: Java Backend Developer
jobs.description: Contributing to the development of a microservices architecture supporting the migration of the core banking system.

jobs.title: Junior Java Developer
jobs.description: Designed, developed, monitored, and maintained Java Spring Boot-based microservices in a distributed environment.

jobs.title: Integration Developer
jobs.description: Developed integrations between enterprise software platforms and applications within the company's infrastructure.

jobs.title: Linux System Administrator
jobs.description: Installed, managed, and monitored Linux servers, ensuring system stability and incident resolution.
